message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam class {
  ArrowSize 2
  BackgroundColor White
  BorderColor Black
  FontColor Black
  FontSize 12
  Alignment Left
}

class "App" as App {
  [C]
  + main()
  + start()
}

class "FileHandler" as FileHandler {
  [C]
  + promptFile():String
  + writeListToFile():void
  + readListFromFile():ArrayList<String>
}

class "HomeScreenController" as HomeScreenController {
  [C]
  - ObservableList<OL> Lists
  + viewListsClicked()
  + listClicked(nameOfList,mode)
  + addBlankListClicked()
  + addExistingListClicked()
  + editListClicked()
  + saveAllListsClicked()
  + confirmDeleteClicked()
}

class "ListScreenController" as ListScreenController {
  [C]
  - ObservableList currentList
  + filterBoxChanged()
  + saveToStorage()
  + addNewItemClicked()
  + deleteSelectedClicked()
  + completeBoxChanged(item)
  + itemDescChanged(item)
  + itemDueDateChanged(item)
  + itemSelected(item)
}

class "item" as item {
  [C]
  - LocalDate dueDate
  - String desc
  + getDesc()
  + getDate()
  + setDesc()
  + setDate()
}

App --> HomeScreenController
App --> ListScreenController
FileHandler --> HomeScreenController
FileHandler --> ListScreenController
item --> ListScreenController

@enduml
